ddls:
CREATE TABLE "turbines" (
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turbine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the turbine (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the turbine was installed */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the turbine in megawatts */,
  "turbine_model" TEXT /* Model of the turbine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the turbine (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "total_energy_produced" REAL /* Total energy produced by the turbine in kilowatt-hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reading was taken */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "RPM_blade" REAL /* RPM of the turbine blades */,
  "oil_temperature" REAL /* Oil temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "oil_level" REAL /* Oil level as a percentage */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "vibrations_frequency" REAL /* Vibrations frequency in Hertz */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in kilopascals */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "energy_produced" REAL /* Energy produced during the reading in kilowatt-hours */,
  "predicted_failure" TEXT /* Predicted failure (yes/no) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the predicted failure */,
  "maintenance_suggestion" TEXT /* Maintenance suggestion based on the readings */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breakdowns" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breakdown */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine that broke down */,
  "breakdown_date" TEXT /* Date and time the breakdown occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breakdown */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Root cause of the breakdown */,
  "estimated_repair_time" REAL /* Estimated time required for repairs in hours */,
  "actual_repair_time" REAL /* Actual time taken for repairs in hours */,
  "cost_of_repair" REAL /* Cost of repairs in dollars */,
  "preventive_measures" TEXT /* Preventive measures taken to avoid future breakdowns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breakdowns_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance task */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine the task was performed on */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date and time the task was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance task in dollars */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance task in hours */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the engineer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the engineer belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine the engineer is assigned to */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer assigned to the turbine */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was made */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the engineer in the assignment (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_config" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine the sensor is installed on */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., anemometer, thermometer) */,
  "sensor_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_required" TEXT /* Indicates if the sensor needs calibration (yes/no) */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, faulty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_config_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine the notification is related to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, reminder) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "acknowledged" TEXT /* Indicates if the notification has been acknowledged (yes/no) */,
  "acknowledged_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who acknowledged the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)
